name: New Orleans' Cholent
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dried lima beans OR fava beans, kidney or other beans, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the brisket with garlic, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. Sear in a heavy skillet using olive oil.
3. Surround the brisket with garlic, onions, beans, and additional salt. Add water, cover, and bake in a preheated 250 degree oven for 8 hours.
4. Just before serving, mix the flour with 1/4 cup of the gravy, stirring briskly. Then stir constantly and pour the paste into the gravy.
Yield: 12 servings
Tip: You can also cook the dish ahead of time, refrigerate overnight, skim off the fat, slice the brisket, and reheat.
